market.macro_notes_md: JULY 15 2026 PRE-MARKET: CPI COOL NARRATIVE CONTINUING. June CPI (released July 14): Headline 3.5% YoY vs 3.8% expected (monthly -0.4% sa vs -0.2% expected). Core 2.6% vs 2.8% expected — most dovish print YTD. TODAY: PPI June 2026 releasing at 8:30 AM ET. Consensus: Headline MoM -0.1% (big decel from prior +1.1%); Core MoM +0.4%; Headline YoY ~6.2% (down from 6.5%). Soft PPI = rate-cut narrative confirmed. Hot PPI (>+0.3% MoM headline) could pause the rally briefly. ASML Q2 BEAT (this morning): Revenue €9.33B (+21.3% YoY), raised 2026 outlook to €43-45B, memory revenue +75% YoY — AI capex cycle confirmed intact. Morgan Stanley Q2 BEAT (this morning): EPS $3.46 vs $2.89 (+20%) — 4th consecutive beat. Iran: Brent ~$86/bbl, Trump escalating strikes, Strait of Hormuz disruption risk ongoing. Rate cut expectations: ~55-65% probability of Sept/Oct cut. UPCOMING: PPI 8:30 AM today; Netflix Q2 July 16 AH; Retail Sales July 16; Michigan Sentiment July 17; AMD Advancing AI 2026 conference July 22-23; TSLA Q2 earnings ~July 22.
